title: oncerum quadrifidum
intro: Oncerum quadrifidum, also known as the Devil's Claw, is a plant species native to the southern parts of Africa. The medicinal properties of Oncerum quadrifidum lie in its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. The health benefits of the plant include relief from arthritis, back pain, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as improved digestion and immune function. Oncerum quadrifidum is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or capsule, and is also used in traditional African medicine to treat a range of health issues.
